Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Observations from the log All cases start with Receive Application RA Then they always do Validate Form VF Then they always do Assess Eligibility AE After that sometimes there is a loop Request Missing Info RMI and then Validate Form VF again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The log shows only one trace per case and all cases follow the same order except for the optional RMI loop There is no concurrency mentioned So we can use a sequence and a loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The process might be structured as Sequence RA VF AE then a loop that allows repeating RMI then VF then AD SC AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If we want to allow zero or more repetitions of RMI then VF we can set A to be a silent step tau and B to be the sequence RMI VF Then the loop would allow zero or more repetitions of the sequence RMI VF

Name: Validation - NE
Text: But note in case 3 we have two RMI events and then VF so our loop model where each iteration does exactly one RMI followed by VF does not match the observed sequence

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Maybe the loop is different perhaps the loop is over RMI only and then after the loop we do VF

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It seems that after AE we either go to AD if no missing info or we go into a rework cycle that involves at least one RMI and then a VF and then after that we go to AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After AE we have an XOR between two branches Branch 1 tau direct to AD Branch 2 one or more RMI then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To model one or more RMI we can put the first RMI outside the loop and then use a loop with tau and RMI for zero or more additional RMI So the rework branch is sequence RMI then loop tau RMI then VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 fits by choosing tau and going directly to AD Case 1 fits with one RMI then exiting the loop then VF Case 3 fits with one RMI then one additional RMI through the loop then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the entire tree is a sequence of RA VF AE then an XOR between tau and the rework sequence then AD SC AC
